name: Great Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large Can Albacore tuna - in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles al dente, rinse with cold water, drain, and toss with a little olive oil. Put aside and cover to keep soft.
2. Saute onions, peppers, celery in olive oil for about 5 minutes. Add pimentos. Set aside.
3. In a large deep skillet, mix together the Mayonaise, Celery soup, Milk, and Sherry. Cook a few minutes until well blended, then add sauted ingredients.
4. Drain tuna, flake, and put in the sauce. Cook for a couple of minutes, stirring gently.
5. In a large bowl, mix the cooked noodles and sauce until well blended.
6. Transfer to small casserole dishes or one large (your choice) and sprinkle with bread crumbs and slivered almonds. Salt & pepper to taste when served.
